code: const SOCKET_BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_SOCKET_BASE||"http://localhost:5000";const createNoopSocket=()=>({connected:false,on:()=>{},off:()=>{},emit:()=>{},disconnect:()=>{}});let socket=null;export const connectSocket=()=>{var _socket;if((_socket=socket)!==null&&_socket!==void 0&&_socket.connected)return socket;const token=localStorage.getItem("token")||"";if(window.io){socket=window.io(SOCKET_BASE,{transports:["websocket"],auth:{token}});}else{socket=createNoopSocket();}return socket;};export const getSocket=()=>socket;export const disconnectSocket=()=>{if(socket){socket.disconnect();socket=null;}};
